benefits.description: Helped with serious eating problems the user has had their whole life
Lost almost 7 pounds in one week

side_effects.description: Red, itchy, and swollen eyes the morning after first injection, persisting for at least 7 days; multiple doctors diagnosed as allergic reaction

protocol_notes: Obtained Reta from a friend who supplied it to multiple others including OP's fiancé with no severe reactions. Bacteriostatic water source unknown. Reaction required multiple clinic and hospital visits. OP concerned about whether allergy is to Reta itself or bacteriostatic water.
